query: SELECT id, courseId, title, type, CASE WHEN videoUrl IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN videoUrl = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE CONCAT(LEFT(videoUrl, 80), '...') END as videoUrl_preview, videoKey, videoDurationSec, createdAt, updatedAt FROM lessons;
